name: Inth
long_description:
Inth is compliance infrastructure built for engineers. Every codebase has hundreds of violations breaking privacy laws right now, but existing tools like OneTrust live in dashboards, not code.

Inth sits in your repo, detects compliance liability, and generates the evidence regulators and procurement actually ask for.

c15t, their open-source consent manager, hit 2.5M npm downloads and is trusted by Zed and Infisical. And that is just the start.

They are building the layer that makes every codebase compliant by default, for modern stacks and the agents rewriting them.
one_liner: Compliance as code infrastructure for engineering teams
